title: Indicator Observation (fact_indicator_observation)
description: A Layer 1 baseline indicator observation: FX, global supply-chain pressure, commodity/energy baselines, and any other numeric series that is not specifically a trade flow, a port/transport measure, or a logistics cost. Mode-neutral.

baseline_definition.description: Explicit definition of the baseline any deviation is measured against. Null means no baseline is defined and no deviation may be published for this series.
